response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates exceptional technical depth and breadth with 15+ years of experience at top-tier companies like Google and Meta, complemented by entrepreneurial success and open-source contributions. His AI-agent infrastructure work at Google and AI-related platform development (e.g., GISCollective) align strongly with the role's focus on AI strategy. While he lacks a formal AI-focused degree, his hands-on experience in AI tooling and cloud technologies compensates significantly.
strengths: 15+ years in software engineering across web, mobile, and embedded systems with leadership roles at Google/Meta
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators) at Google
Entrepreneurial success with open-source AI/Geo-Data platforms (GISCollective) and startup experience
concerns: No formal AI degree (though compensated by practical experience)
Limited direct experience in cloud platform strategy or customer advisory roles
Public-facing contributions (e.g., talks, workshops) are more technical/craftsmanship-focused than AI-strategic
